name: Shunliban Information Service Co.,Ltd
summary: Shunliban Information Service Co.,Ltd engages in the enterprise Internet service business in China. It provides enterprise registration, finance and taxation, intellectual property, investment and financing, and problem solving services in the process of enterprise development. The company also provides modern enterprise services, such as standard and customized advisory services; and user services, professional service factory, cooperative services, service station outlets, and offline service support systems. In addition, it operates online service platform that provides knowledge, application, e-commerce, service, resource, and data cloud services combined with offline service system, as well as open cloud and cloud computing services; and provides smart enterprise services, such as enterprise insurance, procurement, and marketing, as well as service insurance and corporate finance services. The company was formerly known as Shenzhou Yiqiao Information Service Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shunliban Information Service Co.,Ltd in June 2018. Shunliban Information Service Co.,Ltd was founded in 1996 and is based in Beijing, China.
